Mask_APCost-1OnCaster.Description: Skills cost 1 less AP while in Caster Mask.

Stance_VirtuoseDoubleBurn.Description: In Virtuose Stance, every Burn applied is doubled.

Foretell_ApplyBurnPerSunChargeOnConsume.Description: Consuming Foretell applies 2 Burn on target per Sun Charge.

Stains_IncreaseDMGPerLightStain.Description: 20% increased damage with Skills per active Light Stain.

AttackBurnWhilePowerful.Description: While Powerful, 20% chance to Burn on hit.

DoubleAP.Description: Every AP gain is increased by 1.

Augmented1stStrike.Description: 50% increased damage on the first hit. Once per battle.

Survivor.Description: Survive fatal damage with 1 Health. Once per battle.

LuckyAim.Description: 30% chance to recover 1 AP on hitting a Weak Point.

SecondChance.Description: Revive with 100% Health. Once per battle.

SoloFighter.Description: Deal 50% more damage if fighting alone.

Teamwork.Description: 10% increased damage while all allies are alive.

SweetKill.Description: Recover 50% Health on killing an enemy.

AutoPowerful.Description: Apply Powerful for 3 turns on battle start.

AutoShell.Description: Apply Shell for 3 turns on battle start.

AutoRush.Description: Apply Rush for 3 turns on battle start.

AutoRegen.Description: Apply Regen for 3 turns on battle start.

Dodger.Description: Gain 1 AP on Perfect Dodge. Once per turn.

ManOfParry.Description: +1 AP on Parry, but damage received is doubled.

Confident.Description: Take 50% less damage, but can't be Healed.

ReviveCheer.Description: +3 AP to all allies when revived.

ReviveWithRegen.Description: Apply Regen for 3 turns when revived.

ReviveWithPower.Description: Apply Powerful for 3 turns when revived.

Solidifying.Description: +2 Shields when the character's Health falls below 50%. Once per battle.

PiercingShot.Description:
25% increased Free Aim damage.
Free Aim shots ignore Shields.

HealingDeath.Description: On death, the rest of the Expedition recover all Health.

ShieldingDeath.Description: On death, allies gain 3 Shield points.

InvertedAffinity.Description:
Apply Inverted on self for 3 turns on battle start.
50% increased damage while Inverted.

LastStand.Description: Deal 50% more damage if Health is below 10%.

Perfection_Perfection+butDMG+.Description: +1 to all Perfection gain but can't reach Rank S.

Foretell_ConsumeOnBaseAttack.Description: Base Attack consumes 1 Foretell to deal 30% more damage.

Stance_CleanseVirtuose.Description: Cleanse self Status Effects when switching to Virtuose Stance.

Stance_ShieldDStance.Description: +1 Shield on switching to Defensive Stance.

Stance_ShieldOnOSstance.Description: +1 Shield on switching to Offensive Stance.

SosShell.Description: Apply Shell when falling below 50% Health.

SosPower.Description: Apply Powerful when falling below 50% Health.

SosRush.Description: Apply Rush when falling below 50% Health.

DoubleBurn.Description: On applying a Burn stack, apply a second one.

HealingFire.Description: Recover 25% Health when attacking a Burning target. Once per turn.

RewardingMark.Description: +2 AP on dealing damage to a Marked target. Once per turn.

DoubleMark.Description: Mark requires 1 more hit to be removed.

Sniper.Description: First Free Aim shot each turn deals 200% increased damage and can Break.

Cheater.Description: Always play twice in a row.

PowerfulShield.Description: 10% increased damage per Shield Point on self.

BaseShield.Description: +1 Shield if not affected by any Shield on turn start.

InMediasRes.Description: +3 Shields on Battle Start, but max Health is halved.

ShieldAffinity.Description: 30% increased damage while having Shields, but receiving any damage always removes all Shields.

CriticalMoment.Description: 50% increased Critical Chance if Health is below 30%.

FasterThanStrong.Description: Always play twice in a row, but deal 50% less damage.

Warming.Description: 5% increased damage per turn. Can stack up to 5 times.

Shortcut.Description: Immediately play when falling below 30% Health. Once per battle.

RandomDefense.Description: Damage taken is randomly multiplied by a value between 50% and 200%.

GlassCanon.Description: Deal 25% more damage, but take 25% more damage.

DefensiveMode.Description: On receiving damage, consume 1 AP to take 30% less damage, if possible.

SharedCare.Description: When Healing an ally, also Heal self for 50% of that value.

EnergizingHeal.Description: On Healing an ally, also give 2 AP.

PowerfulHeal.Description: Healing an ally also applies Powerful for 1 turn.

ProtectingHeal.Description: Healing an ally also applies Shell for 1 turn.

AcceleratorHeal.Description: Healing an ally also applies Rush for 1 turn.

ConfidentFighter.Description: 30% increased damage, but can't be Healed.

HealingShare.Description: Receive 15% of all Heals affecting other characters.

WeaknessGain.Description: +1 AP on hitting an enemy's Weakness. Once per turn.

VersatileHealer.Description: +2 AP on Healing an ally. Once per turn.

BeneficialContamination.Description: +2 AP on applying a Status Effect. Once per turn.

PhysicalFighter.Description: Convert all Skill damage to Physical damage.

Roulette.Description: Every hit has a 50% chance to deal either 50% or 200% of its damage.

SoulEater.Description: Deal 30% more damage, but lose 20% Health per turn.

Painter.Description: Convert all Physical damage to Void damage.

Immaculate.Description: 30% increased damage until a hit is received.

Tainted.Description: 15% increased damage for each Status Effect on self.

FirstOffensive.Description: First hit dealt and taken deals 50% more damage.

Perfection_IncreasedDamageOnRankD.Description: 50% increased damage on Rank D. No damage increase on other ranks.

Perfection_PerfectionLostOnHeal.Description: No Perfection loss on damage taken. Perfection is instead lost on being Healed.

Perfection_DoublePerfectionVSBurn.Description: Base attack gives 1 Perfection per Burn on target.

Perfection_PerfectionBaseOnCurrentHP.Description: Perfection is now based on current Health. Gain 1 Rank every 20% missing Health.

Perfection_NoPerfectionLossButNoDamageIn.Description: Can't lose Perfection. No damage increase from Rank.

Perfection_RankLossOneByOne.Description: When hit, lose 1 Perfection instead of 1 Rank.

Perfection_StartRankBButLessHP.Description: Start battle on Rank B, but 50% Health.

AttackPlayAgain.Description: Play again after a Base Attack.

Perfection_DoubleOnFreeAimShots.Description: Double Perfection gained on Free Aim shots.

SkillsLightToPhysical.Description: Convert Light damage from Skills to Physical damage.

LightSkillsRegenHP.Description: Dealing Light damage with a Skill recovers 3% Health.

DMG+OnAlternatingPhysicalLight.Description: Casting a Light Skill increases damage of next Physical Skill cast by 50% and vice versa.

AttackConsumeShieldForExtraDMG.Description: Base Attack consumes all Shields to deal 100% increased damage per Shield.

DMG+WhenNoDMGTaken.Description: 20% increased damage for each consecutive turn without taking damage. Can stack up to 5 times.

Perfection_MinC.Description: Rank can't be lower than C.

Perfection_AttackLifestealOnD.Description: On Rank D, recover 20% Health with Base Attack.

Perfection_PerfectionBonusDamageShare.Description: Bonus damage from Perfection applies to all allies at half value. Bonus damage no longer applies to Verso.

Perfection_NoPerfectionLossOnPowerlessEn.Description: Don't lose Rank when taking damage from Powerless enemies.

Perfection_Perfection+1OnPowerlessEnemy.Description: +1 Perfection on hitting a Powerless enemy.

Perfection_Perfection+1OnPowerful.Description: Perfection gained is increased by 1 while Powerful.

Perfection_Perfection+1OnBurn.Description: +1 Perfection on hitting a Burning enemy.

Perfection_PowerlessOnS.Description: On reaching Rank S, apply Powerless to all enemies.

Perfection_SwitchRankSOnBreak.Description:
Switch to Rank S on Break.
Base Attack can Break.

Perfection_BurnOnBaseAtkPerRank.Description: Base Attack applies 2 Burn stack per Rank.

Perfection_BurnDamagePerRank.Description: Increase Burn damage by 50% per Rank, up to 300% on Rank S.

WeakSpotMark.Description: Hitting a Weak Spot applies Marked.

Stance_Heal+OnDStance.Description: 30% increased Heals received in Defensive Stance.

HealOnBurn.Description: Recover 2% Health on hitting a Burning target.

Stance_CounterSwitchToVStance.Description: Switch to Virtuose Stance on Counterattack.

Stance_ShellOutVStance.Description: Gain Shell when switching out of Virtuose Stance.

Stance_PierceOnVStance.Description: In Virtuose Stance, all damage pierce Shields.

Stance_StancelessSwitchToOStance.Description: On turn start, if Stanceless, switch to Offensive Stance.

Stance_StancelessSwitchToDStance.Description: On turn start, if Stanceless, switch to Defensive Stance.

Stance_StancelessPowerful.Description: On turn start, gain Powerful if Stanceless.

AttackShield.Description: +1 Shield on Base Attack. (once per turn)

SelfBurnButDmg+.Description:
Apply Burn on self on turn start.
10% increased damage for each self Burn stack.

Stance_BurnHealOnDStance.Description: While in Defensive Stance, receive Heal instead of Burn damage.

Stains_RandomGeneration.Description: Generate a random Stain on Free Aim shot.

Stains_ElementalCyclingDMG+.Description:
Casting a Skill increases the Skill damage of all other elements by 20%.
Resets when casting a Skill of a previous element.

Stains_TurnStart+StainsIfNoStain.Description: On turn start, if no Stains, 2 random Stains are generated.

Stains_LightningOnFire.Description: When a Fire Stain is generated, a Lightning Stain is also generated. Once per turn.

Stains_EarthOnLightning.Description: When a Lightning Stain is generated, an Earth Stain is also generated. Once per turn.

Stains_IceOnEarth.Description: When an Earth Stain is generated, an Ice Stain is also generated. Once per turn.

Stains_FireOnIce.Description: When an Ice Stain is generated, a Fire Stain is also generated. Once per turn.

SkillsConversionToPhysical.Description: Convert all Skill damage to Physical damage.

Stains_FullCritIfFullStain.Description: 100% Critical Chance when 4 Stains are simultaneously active.

Stains_+RandomStainOnHeal.Description: Healing Skills generate one additional Light stain.

Stains_OverchargeDMG+.Description:
Using a Skill that consumes Stains increases damage by 20%. Can stack up to 5 times.
Resets on using a Skill without consuming Stains.

Stains_FireAppliesBurn.Description: Consuming a Fire Stain applies 1 Burn.

Stains_IceAppliesSlow.Description: Consuming a Light Stain applies Slow to a random enemy.

Stains_EarthAppliesShield.Description: Consuming an Earth Stain applies 1 Shield to self.

Stains_LightningAppliesRush.Description: Consuming a Lightning Stain applies Rush on a random ally.

Stains_AttackFire+.Description: Base Attack generates a Fire Stain.

Stains_AttackLightning+.Description: Base Attack generates a Lightning Stain.

Stains_AttackEarth+.Description: Base Attack generates an Earth Stain.

Stains_AttackIce+.Description: Base Attack generates an Ice Stain.

Stains_Ice+IfSelfFrozen.Description: Gain 2 Ice Stains and 3 AP when Frozen.

FreezeSelfOnLowHP2.Description:
Freeze self when falling below 30% health.
Prevent the next instance of damage while Frozen.

DefreezeAndHealOnTurnStart.Description: On turn start, if Frozen, remove Freeze and recover 60% Health.

Stains_HealEfficiencyIceStains.Description: 30% increased Heal efficiency per Ice Stain.

Stains_IceStainOnTurnStart.Description: Generate one Ice Stain at the beginning of each turn.

InstantReplayOnOverchargedHealSkills.Description: Replay instantly on consuming Stains with a Healing Skill.

Stains_EarthStainOnTurnStart.Description: Generate one Earth Stain at the beginning of each turn.

Stains_IncreaseCritChancePerFireStain.Description: 30% increased Critical Chance per Ice Stain.

GradientPointOnCrit.Description: +5% of a Gradient Charge on Critical hit.

Stains_ApplyBurnStackPerFireStainOnAttac.Description: Base Attack applies 2 Burn per Fire Stain.

Stains_FireStainOnTurnStart.Description: Generate one Fire Stain at the beginning of each turn.

Stains_IncreaseBurnDMGPerFireStain.Description: 30% increased Burn damage per Fire Stain.

Stains_IncreaseBreakDMGPerEarthStain.Description: 30% increased Break damage per Earth Stain.

APonBreak.Description: Gain 9 AP on Breaking an enemy.

InstantReplayOnHittingStunEnemy.Description: Replay instantly on hitting a Stunned enemy.

Stains_GenerateStainsOnGradientAttack.Description: Using a Gradient Attack generates 1 additional Light Stain.

Stains_GainGradientChargeOnStainConsumpt.Description: +5% of a Gradient Charge for each Stain consumed.

GradientAttackAndCounterDMG+.Description: Gradient Attacks and Gradient Counters deal 50% more damage.

Stains_GenerateLightStainRandom.Description: 50% chance to generate a Light Stain when consuming Stains.

Stains_GainAPOnLightStainConsumption.Description: +1 AP on consuming a Light Stain.

Stains_GenerateDarkStainRandom.Description:
50% chance to generate a Dark Stain when consuming Stains.
Deal 50% more damage with Skills per active Dark Stain.

Stains_ConsumeDarkStainsOnAttackDMG+.Description: Base Attacks can consume one Dark Stain to deal 200% more damage.

Stains_ConsumeFourDarkStainsDMG+OnSkills.Description: With 4 active Dark Stains, any Skill can consume them to deal 300% more damage.

Stains_GenerateLightOrDarkStainRandom.Description:
50% chance to generate a Dark or Light Stain when consuming Stains.
Deal 50% more damage with Skills per active Dark Stain.

Foretell_PropagationOnKill.Description: Killing an enemy with Foretell applies its Foretell to another random enemy.

Foretell_PropagationOnApplication.Description: Every time Foretell is applied, it also affects another random enemy.

Foretell_AttackConsumeToApplyBurn.Description: Base Attack consumes all Foretell to apply Burns instead.

Foretell_CurseSelfButDMG+.Description:
Curse self on battle start.
Deal 50% more damage while Cursed.

Foretell_ApplyOnTurnStart.Description: Apply 1 Foretell to each enemy on turn start.

Foretell_ApplyBurnEveryXForetell.Description: Apply 1 Burn every 3 Foretell applied with Skills.

Foretell_FreeAimShotsConsumeForDMG+.Description: Free Aim shots can consume 1 Foretell to deal 100% more damage.

SkillsConversionToDark.Description: Convert all Skill damage to Dark damage.

Foretell_SunSkillsDMG+PerForetell.Description:
Sun Skills have increased damage for each Foretell on the target.
Moon Skills don't generate Moon charges anymore.

Foretell_SunAPIncrease.Description: With at least 1 active Sun charge, gain one additional AP per Foretell consumed.

Foretell_AttackConsumeSunCharge.Description: Base attack can consume 1 Sun charge to apply 5 Foretell.

Foretell_HealEfficiencyPerMoonCharge.Description:
30% increased Heal efficiency per Moon charge.
Base Attack gives 1 Moon charge.

Foretell_AttackDMG+PerForetell.Description: Base Attack has 30% increased damage for each Foretell on target.

Foretell_PropagateForetellOnApplication.Description: During Twilight, every time Foretell is applied it also affects another random enemy.

Foretell_ConsumeChargesOnFreeAim.Description: Free Aim shots can consume a Sun charge to apply 5 Foretell and consume a Moon charge to deal 400% more damage.

Foretell_GivesAPOnConsumingCharge.Description: Consuming a Sun or Moon charge gives 1 AP.

Foretell_AttackApplyBurnPerSunCharge.Description: Base Attack applies one Burn stack per active Sun charge.

Foretell_SunSkillsCharge+.Description: Sun Skills give one more charge.

Foretell_ResetCurseOnTwilight.Description: Reset Curse duration when entering Twilight state.

Foretell_InstantReplayOnTwilight.Description: Play again when entering Twilight state.

Foretell_ApplyMaxForetellOnSunSkills.Description: Sun Skills always apply 10 Foretell, but all damage taken is doubled.

Foretell_AttackConsumeToApplyBurnMoonCha.Description: Base Attack gives 1 Moon charge and consumes all Foretell to apply Burn.

Foretell_OnTwilightBurnDMG+.Description: 100% increased Burn damage in Twilight state.

Foretell_HealOnTurnStartConsumeMoonCharg.Description: Can consume 1 Moon charge on turn start to recover 20% of each ally's Health.

Foretell_MoonSkillsCharge+.Description: Moon Skills give one more charge.

Foretell_DarkConversionOnTwilight.Description: During Twilight, all damage dealt is converted to Dark damage.

Foretell_BuffsOnStates.Description: Apply Shell during Moon, Powerful during Sun, and Rush during Twilight.

Foretell_ShieldOnTurnStartWhenSunCharge.Description: On turn start, gain 1 Shield if at least 1 Sun charge is active.

Foretell_ApplyForetellOnShieldBreakPerSu.Description: Apply 5 Foretell on enemies that break Shields.

Foretell_ApplyBurnOnHitTakenOnSun.Description: While having at least 1 active Sun charge, apply one Burn stack per hit taken.

Foretell_ApplyBurnPerSunChargeOnCounterA.Description: Counterattacks apply 1 Burn per active Sun charge.

Foretell_MoonSkillsAlwaysCritOnMoon.Description: While having at least 1 active Moon charge, Moon Skills are always Critical but damage taken is doubled.

Foretell_ExtendOrIncreaseTwilight.Description: Extend Twilight by one turn on using a Moon Skill. +50% Twilight damage increase on using a Sun Skill.

Foretell_DealAOEDamagePerChargeOnTwiligh.Description: On Twilight Start, deal damage to all enemies based on the amount of charges.

Foretell_ApplyForetellPerChargeOnTwiligh.Description: On Twilight Start, apply 2 Foretell per charge to all enemies.

Foretell_DoubleChargeGain.Description: Double Sun and Moon charge generation.

Foretell_OnTwilightSwitchApplyMarkAOE.Description: On Twilight Start, apply Mark to all enemies.

Foretell_DontRemoveMarkOnTwilight.Description: Hitting a Marked enemy during Twilight doesn't remove Mark.

Foretell_ApplyGreaterRushSlowOnSunMoon.Description:
During Moon, all allies have Greater Rush.
During Sun, all enemies have Greater Slow.

Foretell_ApplyGreaterRushSlowOnTwilight.Description: During Twilight, all allies have Greater Rush and all enemies have Greater Slow.

GainAPOnApplyBuffsDebuffs.Description: +3 AP on applying a Buff or Debuff. Once per turn.

Foretell_GainAPPerMoonChargeOnTurnStart.Description: +1 AP per Moon charge on turn start.

Foretell_BaseAttackConsumeAllAPOnTwiligh.Description:
During Twilight, Base Attack consumes all AP.
Base Attack applies 1 Foretell and deals 50% increased damage per AP consumed.

Foretell_TwilightFreeAimDMG+.Description: During Twilight, Free Aim shots deal double damage.

Masks_ShellOnHeavy.Description: Heavy Mask applies Shell for 3 turns.

Masks_PowerfulOnBalanced.Description: Balanced Mask applies Powerful for 3 turns.

Masks_RegenOnCaster.Description: Caster Mask applies Regen for 3 turns.

Masks_RushOnAgile.Description: Agile Mask applies Rush for 3 turns.

Masks_BestialMeter+OnSkillCast.Description: Using a Skill to update the Bestial Wheel moves it 1 step further.

Masks_BestialMeter+OnParrybutResetOnDMG.Description: Parries increase the Bestial Wheel by 1. Taking damage resets the Bestial Wheel.

Masks_WheelSpinOnFreeAimShot.Description: Free Aim shots spin the Bestial Wheel to a random value.

Masks_Overcharge+APOnAllies.Description: Using an Upgraded Skill gives 1 AP to all other allies.

Masks_BestialMeterRandomIncrementOnSkill.Description: Add a random value between -3 and +3 to the Bestial Wheel on Skill cast.

Masks_AttackAP-ButAlmighty.Description: Using Base Attack consumes 1 AP, but moves the Bestial Wheel to Almighty.

Masks_HeavyAPCost-1.Description: Heavy Mask Skills cost 1 less AP.

Masks_BalancedAPCost-1.Description: Balanced Mask Skills cost 1 less AP.

Masks_CasterAPCost-1.Description: Skills cost 1 less AP while in Caster Mask.

Masks_AgileAPCost-1.Description: Agile Mask Skills cost 1 less AP.

Masks_APCost-1IfAlmighty.Description: Almighty Mask Skills cost 1 less AP.

Masks_CritChanceOnAgile.Description: +50% Critical Chance while in Agile Mask.

Masks_DoubleBreakDMGOnAlmighty.Description: Break damage is doubled while in Almighty Mask.

Masks_GainAPAllAlliesOnAlmightySwitch.Description: Almighty Mask gives 2 AP to all allies.

Masks_SwitchToAlmightyOnBreak.Description: Switch to Almighty Mask on Breaking an enemy.

Masks_DMG+FreeAimIfNotAlmighty.Description: Free Aim shots deal 100% more damage with all Masks except Almighty.

Masks_AlwaysCritOnAlmighty.Description: 100% Critical Chance while in Almighty Mask.

Masks_InstantReplayOnAlmighty.Description: Replay instantly when in Almighty Mask.

Masks_InstantReviveOnDeathOnAlmighty.Description: Revive instantly with full Health if dead while in Almighty Mask. Once per Battle.

Masks_DMG+BonusStackOnOverchargedSkillsC.Description: 30% increased damage per Upgraded Skill used. Resets on using a non-Upgraded Skill.

Masks_WheelSpinOnAttack.Description: Base Attack spins the Bestial Wheel to a random value.

Masks_CritDMG+OnBalanced.Description: Critical hits deal 30% more damage while in Balanced Mask.

Perfection_StartRankSButNoHeal.Description: Start battle at Rank S, but can't be Healed or gain Shields.

BurningMark.Description: Apply Burn on hitting a Marked enemy.

PowerfulMark.Description: Gain Powerful on hitting a Marked enemy.

HealingMark.Description: Recover 25% Health on hitting a Marked enemy. Once per turn.

StayMarked.Description: 50% chance to apply Mark when attacking a Marked target.

FreeAimBurnShot.Description: 20% chance to Burn on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimMarkingShot.Description: 20% chance to apply Mark on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimPowerful.Description: 20% chance to gain Powerful on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimShell.Description: 20% chance to gain Shell on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimSpeed.Description: 20% chance to gain Rush on Free Aim shot.

FreeAimEnergy.Description: 20% chance to gain 1 AP on Free Aim shot.

Versatile.Description: After a Free Aim hit, Base Attack damage is increased by 50% for 1 turn.

PowerfulStrike.Description: Gain Powerful for 1 turn on Base Attack.

ShellStrike.Description: Gain Shell for 1 turn on Base Attack.

PowerlessStrike.Description: Base Attack applies Powerless for 1 turn.

DefenslessStrike.Description: Base Attack applies Defenceless for 1 turn.

ReinforcementParade.Description:
Each successful Parry increases damage by 5% until end of the following turn.
Taking any damage removes this buff.

PowerOfPain.Description: No longer gain AP on Parry. +1 AP on getting hit.

FullEnergyAttack.Description:
On every damage dealt, try to consume 1 AP.
If successful, increase damage by 20%.

Foretell_AttackConsumeBurnToApplyForetel.Description: Base attack can consume 1 Sun charge to apply 5 Foretell.

DeathBombPhysical.Description: On Death, deal damage to all enemies.

SimpleBreaker.Description: 50% increased Break damage on Base Attack.

BreakMomentum.Description: Play again on Breaking a target.

BreakingStrong.Description: Gain Powerful on Breaking a target.

StunEnergy.Description: +1 AP on hitting a Stunned target with a Skill.

HealingStun.Description: Recover 5% Health on hitting a Stunned target.

BurningBreak.Description: Apply 3 Burn stacks on Breaking a target.

CriticalBreak.Description: 100% Critical Chance on hitting a Stunned target.

GradientBreak.Description: +50% of a Gradient Charge on Breaking a target.

BreakShot.Description: 50% increased Break damage with Free Aim shots.

GreatFireBreak.Description: Breaking a target doubles its Burn amount.

GradientHeal.Description: Recover 10% Health on using a Gradient Charge.

GradientStacker.Description: +15% of a Gradient Charge on Base Attack.

GradientBreaker.Description: 50% increased Break damage with Gradient Attacks.

GradientCure.Description: 50% increased Gradient Generation with Healing Skills.

GradientCounterCharge.Description: +10% of a Gradient Charge on Counterattack.

GradientWeakness.Description: +15% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Weakness. Once per turn.

GradientMark.Description: +20% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Marked target. Once per turn.

GreatHealingTint.Description: Healing Tints have double the Healing effect.

CleansingTint.Description: Healing Tints also remove all Status Effects from the target.

BigHealingTint.Description: Healing Tints now affect the whole Expedition.

BigEnergyTint.Description: Energy Tints now affect the whole Expedition.

GradientTint.Description: +5% of a Gradient Charge on using an item.

APOnBurn.Description: +1 AP on applying Burn. Once per turn.

BreakDamageOnBurn.Description: 25% increased Break damage on Burning enemies.

CritChanceBurn.Description: 25% increased Critical Chance on Burning enemies.

BurningDeath.Description: Apply 3 Burn to all enemies on Death.

BreakDamageOnCrit.Description: 25% increased Break damage on Critical hits.

CritChanceOnStunned.Description: 100% Critical Chance on hitting a Stunned target.

CritChanceOnDefenseless.Description: 25% increased Critical Chance on Defenceless enemies.

PowerDodgeCombo.Description: 5% increased damage for each consecutive successful Dodge. Can stack up to 10 times.

BreakSpecialist.Description: Break damage is increased by 50%, but base damage is reduced by 20%.

BreakingDeath.Description: Fully charge enemy's Break Bar on death.

BreakDamageOnSlow.Description: 25% increased Break damage against Slowed enemies.

LongerPowerful.Description: On applying Powerful, its duration is increased by 2.

LongerShell.Description: On applying Shell, its duration is increased by 2.

LongerRush.Description: On applying Rush, its duration is increased by 2.

EvasiveHealer.Description: Heals provided are doubled until any damage is taken.

HealOnBuff.Description: Heal 15% HP on applying a buff.

AutoDispelEnergy.Description: Dispel the first negative Status Effect received and gain 2 AP.

DispelOnAPConsume.Description: Consume 1 AP to prevent Status Effects application, if possible.

HealOnWeakness.Description: Self-Heal by 2% Health on hitting elemental weakness.

HealOnCrit.Description: Self-Heal by 2% Health on dealing a Critical hit.

BreakDamageOnBaseAttack.Description: Increase Break damage on Base Attack.

BreakDamageOnWeakness.Description: Increase Break damage on hitting elemental weakness.

PowerlessOnMarking.Description: Apply Powerless on Marking an enemy.

MarkOnBaseAttack.Description: Mark an enemy on Base Attack.

AlwaysCritOnCounterDamage.Description: Counterattack is always a Critical hit.

LightDMGBurnOnCrit.Description: Light damage can Burn on Critical hits.

TriggerLightningOnCrit.Description: Triggers a lightning strike on Critical hits.

Stance_AttackOffensive.Description: If Stanceless, Base Attack switches to Offensive Stance.

Stance_CritChanceOffensive.Description: +50% Critical Chance while in Offensive Stance.

APOnShield.Description: On applying Shields, also give 1 AP.

Stance_VirtuoseDoubleShields.Description: On switching to Virtuose Stance, double all Shields on allies.

Stance_VirtuoseHealAllies.Description: Allies recover 20% Health on switching to Virtuose Stance.

Stance_ShellOnHighHP.Description: Applies Shell when Health is above 80%.

Stance_VirtuoseOnLowHP.Description: Switch to Virtuose Stance when Health falls below 50%.

Stance_DefensiveSharedAP.Description: In Defensive Stance, gaining AP also gives 1 AP to allies.

Stance_AttackDefensive.Description: If Stanceless, Base Attack switches to Defensive Stance.

CanStealShield.Description: Steal Shields removed by hitting enemies.

Stance_VirtuoseOnShieldBreak.Description: Switch to Virtuose Stance on breaking any Shield.

MarkBreakShields.Description: Hitting a Marked enemy breaks all its Shields.

Stance_ShieldOnParry.Description:
On Defensive Stance, gain 1 Shield per Parry.
Lose all Shields on turn start.

Stance_DefensiveGradientCharges.Description: Double Gradient generation while in Defensive Stance.

GradientChargesOnParry.Description: +5% of a Gradient Charge on Parry.

Stance_CritChanceDefensive.Description: +50% Critical Chance while in Defensive Stance.

APOnCrit.Description: Critical hits with Skills give 2 AP. Once per turn.

Stance_OffensiveBurnStacks.Description: In Offensive Stance, double the amount of Burn applied.

Stance_VirtuoseKeepMark.Description: In Virtuose Stance, hitting a Marked enemy doesn't remove Mark.

Stance_DefensiveBreakDamage.Description: In Defensive Stance, double Break damage.

BreakEarthBurst.Description: Breaking an enemy deals a high amount of Earth damage.

ParryDamageNoDodge.Description: Can't Dodge. +5% increased damage per Parry until damage taken.

GradientOnCrit.Description: +20% of a Gradient Charge on Critical Hit. Once per turn.

GradientOnBurn.Description: +20% of a Gradient Charge on applying Burn. Once per turn.

GradientOnStun.Description: +5% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Stunned enemy.

GradientOnBuff.Description: +10% of a Gradient Charge on applying a Buff. Once per turn.

BestDefense.Description: Deal 50% more damage, but can't Parry or Dodge.

BonusHealthNoDefense.Description: Reduce damage taken by 50%, but can't Parry or Dodge.

DoubleHit.Description: An ethereal Sword deals Light damage on any damage dealt with Skills.

LightDamageBurn.Description: 20% chance to apply Burn on dealing Light damage.

Perfection_SurvivorRankA.Description: Can't die if at least Rank A.

ParrySpecialist.Description: 25% reduced Parry window but double Counterattack damage.

DodgeSpecialist.Description: 25% reduced Dodge window, but 50% chance to gain 1 AP on successful Dodge.

FreeAimDoubleShot.Description: Free Aim Shots deal damage to an additional random target.

Stance_VirtuoseDoubleDMG.Description: In Virtuose Stance, Burn deals double damage.

Stains_AttackLight+.Description: Base Attack generates a Light Stain.

CleasLife.Description: On turn start, if no damage taken since last turn, recover 100% Health.

PerfectDefense.Description: Ranks reduce damage taken by 20% per Rank, instead of increasing damage dealt.

DamageOnPerfectionRank.Description: 25% increased damage on Rank up. Resets on taking damage.

PerfectionOnDamage.Description:
Gain Perfection on receiving damage instead of Parrying or Dodging.
Lose 1 Rank on Parry or Dodge.

PerfectDefenseB.Description: Ranks reduce damage taken by 20% per Rank, instead of increasing damage dealt.

DamageBonusPerHit.Description: Each successive Skill hit deals 10% more damage.

firstHitApplyMark.Description: First hit of a Skill applies Mark.

SecondHitDontConsumeMark.Description: Second hit of a Skill and following hits don't consume Mark.

More4ApDamageBonus.Description: On turn start, consume each AP above 4 to gain 50% more damage per AP consumed.

BurnInVirtuose.Description: On Virtuose, all hits apply Burn.

InflictMarkIfSkillLess4Ap.Description: Using a Skill that costs less than 4 AP applies Mark to all enemies.

CritPerBurn.Description: +5% Critical chance per Burn on the target.

ThunderSkillConsumeBurn.Description: Lightning Skills consume up to 100 Burn to deal 2% more damage per Burn consumed.

NoOverchargeSkillBuff.Description:
Using a Skill that doesn't consume Stains increases damage by 20%.
Resets on using a Skill that consumes Stains.

BaseAttackToDarkStain.Description: Base attack changes all current Stains into Dark Stains.

DamageBonusDarkStains.Description: With 4 active Dark Stains, any Skill can consume them to deal 300% more damage.

FreeAimForwardWheel.Description: Free Aim Shots move the Bestial Wheel 1 step forward.

DamagePerMaskChange.Description: 25% increased damage per Mask change this turn.

DoubleFreeAimDamageAlmighty.Description: Free Aim shots deal double damage while in Almighty Mask.

BaseAttackToHeavy.Description: Base Attack moves the Bestial Wheel to Heavy Mask.

ShieldAllHeroesOnHeavy.Description: Heavy Mask gives 1 Shield to all allies.

ReducedDamageOnHeavy.Description: Damage taken are reduced by 50% while in Heavy Mask.

SOSHealingTint.Description: Consume a Healing Tint when falling below 50% Health.

GradientParry.Description: +5% of a gradient charge on Parry.

GradientOvercharge.Description: On turn start, consume 3 Gradient Charges (if able) to deal 200% more damage this turn.

ConsumingAttack.Description: Base attack consumes up to 100 Burns to deal 10% more damage per Burn consumed.

LongerBreak.Description: Breaks last 1 more turn but the target can't be Broken twice.

Frenzy.Description: Each successive Skill hit deals 10% more damage.

DoubleThird.Description: Every third hit of a Skill deals double damage.

SlowingAttack.Description: Base attack applies Slow for 1 turn.

EmpoweredHealer.Description: Using a Healing Skill gives 50% more damage for 1 turn.

DamageShare.Description: 50% damage taken is redirected to other allies (if possible).

Feint.Description:
Start each turn with 4 Barbapapa stacks.
Every 5th hit with a Skill deals 600% more damage.

TriggerHappy.Description: After shooting 10 times in the same turn, gain +2 AP (once). And following Shots this turn deal 200% more damage.

EmpoweringJumps.Description: Counters deal 100% more damage for each successful Jump Counter this turn.

AlternatingCritical.Description: On Critical hit, 100% increased damage of the next non-Critical hit.

FirstLife.Description: 25% increased damage until death. 20% decreased damage on death. (Once)

CleasDeath.Description: On death, allies gain 25% increased damage until they die.

AureoleRankSToD.Description: Gain Aureole on Rank S, but drop to Rank D.

FourthHitForetell.Description: Every fourth hit with a Skill generates 1 Sun charge and applies 5 Foretell.

ChargesBalance.Description: Can't enter Twilight. On turn start, if Moon and Sun charges are balanced, deal 100% more damage and apply double Foretell.

RandomChargeTurnStart.Description:
On turn start, remove all Sun and Moon charges. 
Then, randomly gain 1 Sun or 1 Moon charge.

AttackSunItemMoon.Description: Base attack adds 1 Sun charge. Using a Tint adds 1 Moon charge.

AlmightyDoubleBurn.Description: Almighty Mask gives 50% increased damage (cumulative) and doubles enemies' Burn.

AlmightyConsumeBurn.Description: Almighty Mask Skills consume up to 100 Burn to deal 2% more damage per Burn consumed.

FrenzyAttack.Description: Each successive base attack hit on the same turn deals 100% more damage.

ShotApplyAttackConsumeForetell.Description: Free Aim shots apply 1 Foretell. Base attack consumes all Foretell to deal 50% more damage per Foretell consumed.

TwilightForetellNotConsumed.Description: During Twilight, any Foretell consumed is not removed.

BypassAffinities.Description: Damage canâ€™t be reduced, blocked, or absorbed by Elemental Affinities.

LuneDoubleHit.Description: An ethereal Sword deals Light damage on any damage dealt with Skills.

SimonimOvercharge.Description: Starting a turn with 1 Earth, 1 Fire, 1 Ice, and 1 Lightning Stain doubles damage dealt this turn.
